title: Dark Matter
description: A custom origin created for the mod of the same name adding the "Dark Matter" origin to play with.
body:
Dark Matter

#

**This is a datapack meant to be an extansion of the mod origins. It allows you to play through a brand new origin, with its own cons and perks to have a way different gameplay than usual. Embodiment of the void, the Dark Matter origin lives through its peculiar consitution using its properties to ease its existence and find a goal in a whole new world, aimlessly wandering.**

##

🟠 **[Matter Storage]** - Your body is composed of dark matter, and is your sole person. You use this for your abilities, to absorb damages, and running out of it means instant death. You regen it naturally overtime. The more damage you should've taken the more dark matter will be lost.

🟠 **[Null]** - Due to the lack of physical attributes you have, your body cannot be affected by any supernatural effects. Potions, beacons and whatnot hold no meaning to you. Hitting entities will also imbue them and remove any effect they have.

🟠 **["Living"]** - You lack any capacity to "consume" nutriments. You cannot eat, but don't have any concept of hunger either. (hunger bar never goes down, and you only have 1 heart due to your dark matter bar being the representation of your life.)

🟢 **[Reality Reflection]** - Your body can reflect the environment around, at the cost of fragilizing its composition. You gradually lose dark matter while invisible.

🟢 **[Incorporeal Travels]** - You can turn your body back into its original state, to phase through everything. The time you've spent inside a "body" has made you uneable to hold this form properly, and you lose dark matter gradually.

🟡 **[Size Review]** - Your full control on your body allows you to change size at will.

🔴 **[Photophobia]** - The light still bothers you, as the void stays still within places the sun cant reach. Your body has to use its life forces to handle the sun, grandually fragilizing until death.

🔴 **[Hydrophobia]** - You dissolve in water and gradually lose dark matter.

🔴 **[Armor-free]** - Your body dislike clothing, and will weaken any armor you wear.

##

This origin also requires the mod Pekhui to work properly. It might still be useable whitout it but "Size Review" will not work.

###

This origin is for now meant to work with fabric on 1.20.1, it might work on later version but the pack.mcmeta number has to be manually changed.

**Origin by devotedmiau**
